use_cases: Generate AI images with customizable style, lighting, and resolution settings
Create AI videos with aspect ratio and duration controls
Produce AI avatars with pose and background customization
Browse generation history and re-use previous prompts
Fine-tune outputs with negative prompts and seed values
ai_summary: A comprehensive AI multimodal generation interface supporting image, video, and avatar creation modes. Features include style presets, lighting controls, aspect ratio selection, AI model choice, resolution settings, prompt suggestions, and generation history tracking. Built with shadcn-style components for a clean, professional creator tools experience.
